h057c9a46g4086g4f8fg8aeeg58ce59a81107: *You don't rest well, flitting between dreams and nightmares.*
he1db09ecg8af9g4205g8c8ag8daafd059eab: *You don't sleep well, flitting between dreams and nightmares.*
hb536b254g2fe2g419dg95d9g9d3587343c49: *Maybe you break your meditation because you know something is wrong. Or maybe you just get lucky.*
hb14652adg1d59g40ddg8603gc8ba3edb14da: *Maybe you wake up because you know something is wrong. Or maybe you just get lucky.*
hcc1aa697g5552g4b70gae5cgecdd1cc1d236: No no - it's not what it looks like, I swear!
hce5ca317g2fffg4034g858ag457b1cc8772c: I wasn't going to hurt you! I just needed - well, blood.
h6e183817g825bg4b43g833cgb564a6343f40: *There, in dim firelight, you see him for what he really is: a vampire. A slave to sanguine hunger.*
hf8027310g2f4eg4a21ga20dgf347f2321260: That hunter in the swamp was right - you're a vampire spawn.
ha9d509fbg9f50g49dag8c69g6870a7a79e2e: It's not what you think - I'm not some monster!
h199389e5gd172g4dfag93c7g5c927cd6de6e: I feed on animals! Boars, deer, kobolds - whatever I can get.
h098b5dd6g06ddg4b31g8d97gdb724b80dcdb: I'm just too slow right now. Too weak.
hc0293126g33feg4c00gbf1agecb9ff944e71: If I just had a little blood, I could think clearer. Fight better. Please.
h9fee891ag4a52g4947g8e2dg30b32ba72a77: *A strange sensation courses through you, and your companion's mind unfolds, secrets half-revealed.*
hc28c0f47ge573g488bg8fb4gbe54d8cffc22: At best, I was sure you'd say no. More likely, you'd ram a stake through my ribs.
h9f9d03c8ga05eg44c8g8c37ge9988dd8242e: No, I needed you to trust me. And you can trust me.
h0587df0dg7465g4630g8ca8g2ee64e970adb: Thank you. Do you think you could trust me just a little further?
hb4237b75g95bcg4946gbd66ga78a9ebdeb59: I only need a taste, I swear.
ha13df6d3gf4eag4b58gb34age100a0c58a82: Fine. But not a drop more than you need.
hc3fbf64egceb2g4073gbc10g2d05c5598008: Really? I - of course. Not one drop more.
h142c2812g1765g4868g882fg79c33b6ffb34: *He holds you carefully, delicately. Until he strikes.*
h7f758e5fgc1aeg4f7fga3f7g83a9a13e1ea8: *It's like a shard of ice into your neck - a quick, sharp pain that fades to throbbing numbness. Your breath catches, your pulse quickens.*
heccdb8d7g88b3g467cga241g1a0d960105eb: My mind is finally clear. I feel strong. I feel ... happy!
h7f0e21ceg7526g4834g8047g1dd444227fa0: Don't be so dramatic. This is just a little transaction between friends.
h040d2d14gbdcag4844ga7f4g5195c0bea3ee: *You lean into him, losing yourself. You can feel your blood racing, coursing through both your bodies. A gentle, numb feeling starts to spread.*
h136e91b0g6defg4a82g9146g67d04dbc9563: I was just swept up in the moment.
h83f2ac50g33f5g4957gb4a4g7b81dd52b274: But it worked. I feel good. Strong. Happy!
hc9a79393gd3aeg4056ga05bg656a7301fef7: But I didn't. And that's what matters.
h494681b5g7737g4327gb597g6a11ac6cc3b4: And look what you've gained. Together, we can take on the world.
hed2498b6g90c3g46e5gafa7gc3ed7a228b6c: I hope so. I look forward to seeing you fight.
h58de89d2ge10cg40dbg8f13ge46eaeace8ac: You need to leave my camp. Now.
hf076b20fgb6e5g48a7g9081geb515b343d82: You'd toss me aside over this?
h7a91f2d7g579dg41a3g9e4bg244030255cce: Fine. See how far you get without me.
h0e494830g9cc5g4adbgb305g9141a1309e42: If you ever try that again, I'll cut you in half.
h79dadeafg0846g4a50g8807g914ab253cf13: It won't happen again, you have my word.
hf5236443g5f6bg4cbfga5b6g54f878b7b885: I'm looking forward to seeing you fight.
h940c3bc8g276dg471cga805g83620ff4a76a: Shouldn't take long. So many people need killing.
h29a92ecbg635fg431cgb3c3gef8c88df39c4: Now, if you'll excuse me, you're invigorating, but I need something more filling.
hcca08b02gdc8ag4875g97b0g3adec7ceefc0: *You watch as he stalks towards the forest. Stronger. More confident. Ready to hunt.*
h57649884g2f9fg4e51g8f09g60b57221efe1: This is a gift, you know. I won't forget it.
hfce8e801g87bbg4ea8gb33bg7be86fb082e8: *He doesn't finish the thought. It slides away as the light fades from his eyes.*
h47bf40a4g7da4g4754ga37bgc15157092acf: *You drive a blade into his chest, but it glances off a rib.*
h408731abg200cg45efg9bd0g581164938174: *You try to grab him, but it's too late. He's gone.*
h579d994bga02dg411egb515g5255c7a9ac84: His guard's down - drive the stake into his heart.
h038f9991g504bg452fgb41bgdcbc283c19ca: *You drive the wood into his chest, but it glances off a rib.*
h0d9920aeg0a70g4a67g987fg735895dfab2a: *You can hear how weak your voice is. So can he, but he doesn't care. He's long past caring.*
hbf245e29g1041g40eag92a0g0a67bcde4306: *You feel a little cold, but that's all. There's no more pain, no more fear, no more struggle. It's all over...*
ha245f2ccg6da9g40e5gb8f1g00e2937ecfee: Ah. Perhaps I went a little far.
hb331783bg1643g491dgbc2cg5fe3c5495740: *You try to connect, but your legs give out. You slump against him, helpless.*
h7ddb8d94gf8edg4d83ga0cegbd442cd58b6c: *You try to push him back, but his grip just gets tighter. You can feel your blood racing, coursing through both your bodies.*
h44f0c654g2f0fg4c3fga287g39b6d244b302: *He doesn't finish the thought. It slides away as the light fades from his eyes.*
h6ad733cag7828g448bga1e6gfa02243526c7: *You drive the stake into his chest, but it glances off a rib.*
h15b00097gd48cg4243g9ce4ge39746e964d2: Agree, but put the stake against his chest. To make sure he's careful.
h44186511gb622g48e2g8284gbd79433b4a2b: Ah. Of course. I shall be gentle as a babe.
h1d070612g2e99g4c1eg8e4cg2bee5110a410: |You're welcome to, but you might bite off more than you can drink.|
he4a05efdgaf5bg4b32ga8a4g1f0077286a60: Really? Well, let's see, shall we?
h6d5cae91ge0bag4420gbc99gc552152cc499: *He moves in quickly, eagerly, and his bite is like a shard of ice through your neck.*
ha91f930dga53dg4cbbgbec4gb26b6d4777b1: *But something inside you stirs, and the cold fades.*
hf3cf5875g9d48g4592g8c81g309eee17766a: Urgh! You taste like bile. What in the hells is wrong with you?
hc5f26a89gcc0cg4240g9169g4aca6b30c9a1: |Think of it as a warning. I am not for eating.|
heb5b6a76g445ag4188gb61fgae53c3ac9da5: Safe to say this will never happen again.
h03c999d8g0fa2g44a6g8e63g54aaab0de2a1: I'll go and find something on four legs to eat, I suppose.
h21959930g235bg49c0g8af8gde2f09e289aa: *You watch him stalk away, slumped, sulking, and ready to kill.*
h8265255eg8b5dg453bg9a1fg321b7d7a6f3e: He's too dangerous. Draw your weapon and strike.
hd2b07b62g95e0g4349g9123g9d92d1da101e: He's too dangerous. Drive the stake into his heart.
he23027f7g25fdg4ee7g921fg3d07a9c1461e: |You have your secrets, I have mine.|
h882a94deg9032g40dbgae97gfe3df4ab2c1b: |It's a Netherese devestation orb. Not for the faint of heart.|
h63bd857ag0e8cg4051g9a0eg145f2f90638d: No. No, of course, silly of me to even ask.
h5b24b114g7228g4dc3g804ag60d6567d6229: You tried to bite me. How can I trust you?
h2b7d7244gc4a1g4809g8670g466309fbd69e: Because we don't have a choice! Not if we're going to save ourselves from these worms.
h36ba63e9ga6e3g4bdfgae6fg571d9734f9cd: I need you alive. You need me strong.
hf83e028cg29d8g41e3ga3eegfafc6929dcf7: Please. Only be a taste, I swear. I'll be well, you'll be fine, and everything can go back to normal.
h043aaa7bgacd4g457dgaddagaf4c023201fb: Leave. If I ever see you again, I'll kill you.
hd3172d67g9b6bg4339g8ec7gdc197bd7a6d1: At best, I was sure you'd say no. At worst...
h1c8a7ae8g05c2g42cfg9030g546753d13383: I don't care how much you need - you're not drinking my blood.
h6e182d31g7b0dg4052ga226g74b74c203acd: Push into his mind, searching for the truth.
hd32bf2c4gd377g4dacg8f7ag35d9926d039e: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h3b34bfaeg2ef6g426fgbbcegee47a1654b6d: *His mind opens up, revealing cracked and quivering memories. At their heart, you see dark eyes, commanding you to feed.*
h432bc0b9g122eg46e5gaed0gb4cb75b3bde2: *You open your mouth and bite down. Not into a tender neck, but into the twisting body of a rat - the only thing your master lets you eat.*
h983efb0bg8aa3g424bg9f64g855411e03cb2: You ate animals because you were forced to. Not because you wanted to.
haa9db4fdg992fg4844gb1eeg4eae462c4d3a: I - yes. Yes, I ate whatever disgusting vermin my master picked. So you can see why I'm slow to trust you.
h233e20degc149g4626g8dbfg30e9295b83f3: But I do trust you. And you can trust me.
h81d8f89fg011eg43d0g8c43g6444ef5e6441: Why didn't you tell me you were a vampire?
h71d315dfg57d8g4c68gaef5g57019e11cff3: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
hd888b173g7cb1g4de6gb2ffgd3f521418352: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
ha418f36dg16f5g46bfgbadcg06844174348f: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
h03d37d31gfd94g41e5g9ef4ge03fba1f96ac: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h49bdd80cg8f29g4ee8g8749g5c2d2253de56: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
ha3afe982g65f5g44d5gaa9egb24b96f4160f: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
h7487a472g4923g461dgbb76g2f82b61b284a: Push into his mind, searching for the truth.
hcb7d341ege06bg4039ga8fbgb134c0ac09d7: *You feel yourself repulsed as the doors of his mind slam shut.*
h100e9758g2587g4f36g9694g87a92dd38d2b: This is not the time to start invading each other's minds.
hafc20c67g99bfg443dgbeb5g1b9f54cacb00: I wouldn't if you'd been honest with me. Why didn't you tell me?
h6dda4de3gec01g496eg9e92g40945b55dca9: It's not the time to drink each other's blood either.
h3d5de2f1g2d96g4d01gbec5gdf4dab4100f7: Push into his mind, searching for the truth.
h75135f5dgf606g4fc2ga6efg4160a8561ce5: *You focus on the source of the power, but it is quiet and still. It needs to rest.*
h1b34bffcg9254g4bfdg8637g7d9c85ee96f6: Push into his mind, searching for the truth.

h63a7dd0eg612ag4fecga607g63021ca5911f: I can't believe I didn't see it - we even found the boar you snacked on.
h8e92ab3fgbc62g40fegbba4g2f792e8cc1b6: How long since you killed someone? Days? Hours?
h20bd3c8aga313g4bb1g83dag6e8ef0a89bb0: I've never killed anyone! Well, not for food.
ha99e30ebgcf47g4e61ga4eagcd2d62ef257d: I feed on animals. Boars, deer, kobolds - whatever I can get.
h0e958a1fgb526g4129gb8ecgb9d256a293ea: But it's not enough. Not if I have to fight. I feel so weak.
h63de8eccg6173g4687g90bag86559fe256e9: Snap the branch in half to create a stake.
h6c37a685g3efcg427fg8a5ag578738a96bb6: No. Stop. I wasn't going to hurt you, I swear!

h4c813337g45e5g422fgab9bg0ac09764eec4: No. Stop. I wasn't going to hurt you, I swear!
